fullName:
com.blockether.spel.bridge-test.The engine survives a full-page navigation: its connect route (url + token)
   is persisted per-tab in sessionStorage, so a real reload re-subscribes
   automatically instead of losing the tab..persists the route, clears it on disconnect, and re-subscribes on reload
name:
The engine survives a full-page navigation: its connect route (url + token)
   is persisted per-tab in sessionStorage, so a real reload re-subscribes
   automatically instead of losing the tab. > persists the route, clears it on disconnect, and re-subscribes on reload
